case_title: ALCHEMY SEARCH PARTNERS VS. REY ARELLANO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALCHEMY SEARCH PARTNERS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ARELLANO, REY THE COURT DETERMINES THAT THE PARTIES REACHED AN ACCORD AND SATISFACTION IN ACCEPTING PAYMENT OF $15,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNCLAIMED SENT TO DEFENDANT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALCHEMY SEARCH PARTNERS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-04-2010 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-09-2010 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED BY BOTH SIDES.
